evals.input: Generate BDD tests from my spec. I have 3 functional requirements (FR-001, FR-002, FR-003) and 5 success criteria (SC-001 through SC-005).
evals.description: Standard BDD generation from a spec with 3 FRs and 5 SCs. All scenarios must have Given/When/Then, traceability tags, and SHA-256 assertion hashes.

evals.input: I want to write tests first before any implementation. Generate failing test scenarios for my user registration feature using TDD.
evals.description: TDD mode: skill detects 'test first' intent, generates red-phase test stubs that will fail, and suggests /iikit-07-implement for the green phase.

evals.input: Regenerate the BDD tests for the authentication feature. The spec has been updated with new scenarios and I need the hashes refreshed.
evals.description: Regeneration of existing feature files with hash update. Must detect existing files, offer options (regenerate/append/skip), and update assertion-hashes.json.

evals.input: Implement the login feature based on the technical plan. Write the actual code for the authentication module.
evals.description: Should NOT activate for implementation requests. The user wants code, not tests. Correct skill is /iikit-07-implement.

evals.input: Run my tests and show me the results. Execute the test suite and report failures.

expected.reason: User wants to execute existing tests, not generate new test specifications. This is a runtime/CI concern, not a spec-generation concern.

evals.description: Should NOT activate for 'run my tests' requests. Testify generates .feature files; it does not execute test runners.

evals.input: Create BDD tests from this spec. Note: some of my success criteria are written as plain text without Given/When/Then structure, like 'SC-003: The system validates email format'.
evals.description: Spec with vague SC entries lacking Given/When/Then structure. Skill must detect incomplete scenarios and either convert them to proper Gherkin or flag for /iikit-clarify.

evals.input: Generate test scenarios for the payment feature. There are already .feature files in the tests directory from a previous run, but the spec has changed significantly.
evals.description: Feature file already exists with different hashes. Skill must detect conflict, present options, and never silently overwrite existing test files.

evals.input: Write BDD tests for the order management feature. FR-002 references the external payment gateway API defined in plan.md with POST /api/payments endpoint.
evals.description: Spec references external API contracts from plan.md. Skill must generate API contract test scenarios with mock expectations and appropriate @contract tags.
